name: All Mod Packs
description: Makes it so you play through all your ENABLED modpacks' songs. (WARNING: Some things may break.)

name: (All Mod Packs) Include Base Game
description: Makes it so the Base Game in conluded when you turn on the All Mod Packs option.

name: Auto Select
description: If a song has only one difficulty it will automatically play.

name: First Song Played
description: The song you selected is played first.

name: Endless Mode
description: Makes it so the Marathon will never end.
